news.t: 3 Actively Managed ETFs To Consider This September

holdings.infoBox: OMFL is an equity ETF with a total of 482 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apple stock at 8.05%, NVIDIA at 4.94%, Alphabet at 4.18%, Alphabet at 3.39%, and Microsoft at 2.74%.

overview.description: The Invesco Russell 1000 Dynamic Multifactor ETF (OMFL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund tracks an index of US large-cap stocks selected by a combination of five investment factors, which are weighted based on current macroeconomic conditions. OMFL was launched on Nov 8, 2017 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: 3 Actively Managed ETFs To Consider This September
data.text: The growing application of actively managed ETFs makes them highly lucrative investment products, given the developing opportunity set within the modern financial markets.
